text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2506.07218 belongs to a real paper titled "Perception-R1: Advancing Multimodal Reasoning Capabilities of MLLMs via Visual Perception Reward" by Tong Xiao, Xin Xu, Zhenya Huang, Hongyu Gao, Quan Liu, Qi Liu, and Enhong Chen — a completely different title and entirely different set of authors than those cited. No paper with the exact title "Perception-r1: A reinforcement learning framework for multimodal perception with verifiable rewards" by Wen Xiao, Weijie Zhang, Jie Hu, Rui Chen, and Jie Yang was found anywhere.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.07218
